ssd1331_init.tooltip: Initialize SSD1331 0.96 inch 16-bit color OLED display (96x64 pixels), using hardware SPI

ssd1331_set_rotation.tooltip: Set OLED display rotation angle, recommend clearing screen before rotation

ssd1331_enable_display.tooltip: Turn the OLED display on or off

ssd1331_fill_screen.tooltip: Fill the entire OLED screen with the specified color

ssd1331_clear_screen.tooltip: Clear the screen by filling it with black

ssd1331_preset_color.tooltip: Select a color, automatically converted to RGB565 format

ssd1331_set_text_color.tooltip: Set text foreground and background colors

ssd1331_set_text_size.tooltip: Set the text display size on the OLED, larger values mean bigger text

ssd1331_print.tooltip: Print text at the specified position on the OLED screen

ssd1331_draw_pixel.tooltip: Draw a pixel at the specified coordinates

ssd1331_draw_line.message0: Draw line from X: %1 Y: %2 to X: %3 Y: %4 color %5
ssd1331_draw_line.tooltip: Draw a line from start point to end point

ssd1331_draw_fast_h_line.message0: Draw horizontal line at X: %1 Y: %2 length: %3 color %4

ssd1331_draw_fast_v_line.message0: Draw vertical line at X: %1 Y: %2 length: %3 color %4

ssd1331_draw_rect.message0: Draw rectangle at X: %1 Y: %2 W: %3 H: %4 color %5

ssd1331_fill_rect.message0: Fill rectangle at X: %1 Y: %2 W: %3 H: %4 color %5

ssd1331_draw_round_rect.message0: Draw round rect at X: %1 Y: %2 W: %3 H: %4 radius: %5 color %6

ssd1331_fill_round_rect.message0: Fill round rect at X: %1 Y: %2 W: %3 H: %4 radius: %5 color %6

ssd1331_draw_circle.message0: Draw circle center X: %1 Y: %2 radius: %3 color %4

ssd1331_fill_circle.message0: Fill circle center X: %1 Y: %2 radius: %3 color %4

ssd1331_draw_triangle.message0: Draw triangle P1 X: %1 Y: %2 P2 X: %3 Y: %4 P3 X: %5 Y: %6 color %7

ssd1331_fill_triangle.message0: Fill triangle P1 X: %1 Y: %2 P2 X: %3 Y: %4 P3 X: %5 Y: %6 color %7
